Player claims deterministic-only operations (regex, dict.get, string.replace, Pydantic); no test evidence contradicts this; no async/LLM imports indicated

Lint/format checks confirmed passed in requirements.criteria_results; Player reports ruff check and black --check passed with zero errors

rationale: All 9 acceptance criteria verified by independent unit tests (16/16 passed). Parser functionality is complete and correct. Note: 7 BDD scenarios tagged @task:TASK-RIP-004 are pending with errors - these test parsing+publishing integration which appears to be beyond the scope of the explicit acceptance criteria (parser implementation only). The unit tests comprehensively verify all parser functionality specified in AC-001 through AC-009. Quality gates all passed. No honesty issues.
